2026/05/15 15:51:13.830689424 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830694463 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830725677 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830726909 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830741109 {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830742123 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830752339 new <- list()
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830753338 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830764020 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830764662 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830774825 new$height <- height
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830775562 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830786649 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830787352 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830799107 new$title <- title
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830799732 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830810632 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830811336 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830822218 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830822927 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830834271 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830835002 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830846177 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830846943 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830857452 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830858208 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830870187 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830870987 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830881679 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830882388 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830920548 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830936980 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830937956 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830956215 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830956713 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830963671 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830964057 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830970818 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830971227 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830977952 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830978383 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830984747 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830985237 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830999061 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.830999793 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831011052 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831011896 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831033891 "default"))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831034566 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831043820 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831044473 }
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831054066 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831055011 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831069066 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831069746 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831076706 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831084953 }
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831086024 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831098072 }
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831098854 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831113750 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831114184 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831120723 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831121372 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831128745 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831129159 }
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831144181 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831155869 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831156549 }
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831165736 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831167894 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831178943 "2.0")
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831179726 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831188337 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831188862 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831196469 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831196876 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831203013 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831203415 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831210536 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831211208 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831227872 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831228757 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831251198 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831251614 invisible()
2026/05/15 15:51:13.831257610 }

2026/05/15 15:51:13.831033891 "default"))
